name: Vegan: Blue Corn-Pecan Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Whole wheat or kamut flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind pecans in a blender or food processor until just finely ground.
Will turn to nut butter if ground too long.
Combine the ground pecans with cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt.
Stir well to blend. Refrigerate if not for use right away.
2. In a separate bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups of milk or water with vegetable oil and vanilla extract.
Stir well to blend.
3. Add wet ingredients to dry and stir until just smooth.
If necessary, add extra milk to create a consistency thin enough to pour from a ladle.
4. Heat a well-oiled skillet or griddle until a drop of water sizzles when dropped on the surface.
Ladle batter onto the skillet, about 1/4 cup for each pancake.
